title: abutilon fruticosum var. microphyllum
intro: Abutilon fruticosum var. microphyllum, also known as the dwarf Indian mallow or compact Indian mallow, is a variant of the Abutilon fruticosum plant, which is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abutilon fruticosum var. microphyllum include its potential use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
